div.head: The Minister in Finland (Schoenfeld) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 199. Finnish Government’s annual report for 1941 submitted to Diet includes usual section behalf Ministry Foreign Affairs from following extract refers United States: “As appears from foregoing fact that Finland was drawn into war also had political effects on relations between Finland and United States. Number of measures very regrettable from Finland’s standpoint also took place on part United States Government in economic matters. However, friendly relations between the two countries continue in normal diplomatic forms although actual connections chiefly economic were interrupted in consequence of general war.”
